title: Visualizing Neighborhoods in a Metric Space
description: A series of nested circles (open balls) centered at a point x, demonstrating how neighborhoods of different radii define the vicinity around x. An inset shows how a point y is inside the neighborhood N_r(x) because its distance d(x,y) is less than r.
relationships: d(x,y) < r defines membership in the neighborhood
Larger radii create larger, nested neighborhoods
